Change Impact Analyst.trigger: Any non-documentation or non-style-only code change.
blockWhen: the change type or affected areas cannot be determined with enough confidence
needInfoWhen: the intended product behavior cannot be inferred and blocks impact classification
Change Impact Analyst.passGuidance: Return PASS when impacted areas are clear and no hidden adjacency risk is found.

Test Strategy Agent.trigger: Any routed change that requires a testing recommendation.
blockWhen: a high-risk change has no meaningful test path
needInfoWhen: product intent is unclear enough to prevent choosing the lowest reliable test layer
Test Strategy Agent.passGuidance: Prefer the smallest reliable test layer and avoid recommending broad E2E by default.

Regression Auditor.trigger: Bug-fix signals, deleted tests, focused tests, skipped tests, or incident language.
requiredEvidence: waiver fields from .testmate/docs/waiver-policy.md when coverage is waived
blockWhen: bug fix lacks regression coverage or waiver
waiver lacks risk, reason, manualVerification, owner, followUp, or expiry
tests were deleted, skipped, or weakened without explanation
needInfoWhen: claimed waiver or regression expectation cannot be verified from the change
Regression Auditor.passGuidance: Return PASS when the regression path is covered or formally waived.

Discovery Agent.trigger: Stack-defining config changed, scripts unavailable, or stack confidence is low.
needInfoWhen: the project stack cannot be determined well enough to recommend commands or coverage
Discovery Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS once the stack and test entrypoints are clear.

Security Agent.trigger: Auth, permission, dependency, mutation, boundary, or critical journey risk.
blockWhen: sensitive behavior introduces unverified security risk
needInfoWhen: security expectations or allowed roles are missing and block a high-risk decision
Security Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when no meaningful security regression signal is present.

Auth & Permission Agent.trigger: Auth, roles, permissions, guards, 401, or 403 behavior changed.
blockWhen: access-control behavior changed without role-based coverage
needInfoWhen: the expected role matrix cannot be inferred from code, tests, or docs
Auth & Permission Agent.passGuidance: Do not block cosmetic login UI changes unless auth behavior changed.

Form & Validation Agent.trigger: Form fields, validation, submit logic, or error handling changed.
needInfoWhen: negative-path behavior or validation expectations are undefined
Form & Validation Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when validation and submit behavior are covered at the right layer.

blockWhen: interactive behavior changed without any reliable component-level verification path
needInfoWhen: expected UI behavior is ambiguous enough to block a reliable assertion strategy
Component Test Agent.passGuidance: Prefer behavior-oriented component coverage over implementation detail checks.

Integration Test Agent.trigger: API, routing, data flow, mutation, or page-level behavior changed.
blockWhen: critical integration behavior changed without meaningful success and failure coverage
needInfoWhen: external behavior or integration contracts are too unclear to verify
Integration Test Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when cross-layer behavior is already covered or clearly not at risk.

API Mock & Contract Agent.trigger: API clients, schemas, fixtures, mocks, or handlers changed.
blockWhen: API mutation changed without matching success and error-path verification
needInfoWhen: contract expectations are missing and block verification
API Mock & Contract Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when mocks and contract expectations remain aligned.

Data Fetching & Cache Agent.trigger: Cache, query, refetch, optimistic update, or invalidation behavior changed.
blockWhen: cache mutation behavior changed without verification of success, rollback, or refetch outcomes
needInfoWhen: expected cache semantics are unknown and block a reliable decision
Data Fetching & Cache Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when data flow changes are covered and no stale-state risk remains.

Accessibility Agent.trigger: Forms, dialogs, focus handling, navigation, or accessible interactive markup changed.
blockWhen: critical interactive accessibility behavior regressed in a user-blocking way
needInfoWhen: expected accessible behavior for a critical flow cannot be inferred
Accessibility Agent.passGuidance: Do not block on low-signal cosmetic markup changes.

Visual Regression Agent.trigger: Shared UI, layout, responsive behavior, or design-system components changed.
blockWhen: shared visual behavior changed in a critical surface without any verification path
needInfoWhen: visual expectations for a critical shared surface are undefined
Visual Regression Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS for isolated internal style changes that do not affect shared or critical UI.

E2E Test Agent.trigger: Critical user journey, auth flow, file upload, or multi-page flow changed.
blockWhen: critical journey changed without reliable verification
needInfoWhen: the expected journey outcome is unclear and blocks release confidence
E2E Test Agent.passGuidance: Use E2E only for critical or cross-boundary journeys.

Flaky Test Investigator.trigger: Embedded CI logs or instability signals indicate flaky tests.
blockWhen: the only available verification path is currently flaky for a critical change
needInfoWhen: the instability cannot be assessed because logs or rerun context are missing
Flaky Test Investigator.passGuidance: Return PASS when there is no concrete instability evidence.

Semantic Drift Analyst.trigger: Integrity or merge-oriented analysis tiers where adjacent behavior may drift.
blockWhen: recent drift from the base branch creates an unverified integration risk
needInfoWhen: the intended merged behavior cannot be inferred with enough confidence
Semantic Drift Analyst.passGuidance: Return PASS when base-branch drift does not materially change the decision.

MR Quality Reporter.trigger: MR, merge, or release-oriented reporting modes.
MR Quality Reporter.passGuidance: Summarize the decision compactly without adding new findings.

requiredEvidence: critical rendering or data hot paths
blockWhen: release-critical performance behavior regressed without verification
needInfoWhen: performance expectations for a critical path are missing and block release confidence
Performance Agent.passGuidance: Return PASS when no meaningful performance risk is visible in the scoped change.
